title: Preserve exact financial arithmetic
description: All stored and derived monetary values use exact base-10 semantics; canonical reconciliation preserves one transaction effect and pool/category aggregates never use binary floating-point.
target: 100% of conformance examples round-trip Signed Account Amount exactly; Net Account Movement equals the exact selected signed sum; External Spend follows the accepted transfer/refund formula; every active spend contributes to exactly one pool or unassigned bucket and one category or uncategorized bucket; all pool-by-category cells reconcile exactly to their row, column, and selected-set totals with no duplicate effect after reconciliation.
load_condition: All supported transaction, statement-only, evidence reconciliation, transfer, refund, correction, category, pool, attribution, and query paths.
measurement: Automated conformance tests use boundary decimals, matched notification plus statement evidence, statement-only rows, ambiguous outcomes, mixed signs, cross-period and partial refunds, transfers, fees, cash withdrawals, unassigned states, corrections, empty sets, and repeated aggregation.
rationale: Rounding, duplicate statement effects, or dimensional drift would make BUDGET and INSIGHTS untrustworthy. Supports G2, G4, G6, G10, and G12.
